title: Sable Tool
description: An add-on for Sable and Create mod to facilitate managing so-called "Sub-Levels"/"Simulated Contraptions"
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rUuQlpYg-w0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe><iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SgzfsX54IcQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
 

## Controls:

***

Holding Breeze Rod will show you Sub-Level boundaries and center-of-masses and allow you to do several things. 

**\[Right-Click\]** - Places single-block Sub-Level. Default Jack O’ Lantern but if you hold any block on your offhand, then that block will be placed.

**\[Right-Click on Sub-Level\]** -Creates clone above it.

**\[Right-Click on Sub-Level while Holding Shift\]** - Uploads schematic and gives the schematic to the user immediately.

**\[Hold Alt\] (Or Any Key Bound as Create Alt Modifier)** - Shows names of the Sub-Levels. Right click on a Sub-Level while holding Alt will allow user to modify the name.

**\[Left-Click on Sub-Level\]** - Selects Sub-Level for deletion. Left-Click while not looking at Sub-Level will open menu for confirming deletion.

**\[Middle-Click on Sub-Level\]** (Or Any Key Bound As Item Pick) - Will teleport player to the top-center of the Sub-Level that the player is looking at.

**\[Ctrl-Click on Sub-Level\]** - It will start to track forces of the looked Sub-Level.

# Addition

***

It adds a button in Contraption Diagram that allows you to track forces of the Contraption(Sub-Level).
